description: Refactor the 'inventory-api' deployment in the 'retail-system' namespace to use Kubernetes internal DNS for its external dependencies, abstracting the hardcoded IP addresses for the Oracle RAC database and the external domain for the payment provider. Implement the resource and configuration changes defined in the migration specification at /home/ga/Desktop/migration_spec.md. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
